dependencies.name: qtbase
dependencies.reason: The Experimental immutable settings/theme projection and panel window host directly use system Qt Core and GUI, while the passive launcher, task, and notification presentation adapters use Qt Core. Ubuntu 24.04 CI verifies Qt 6.4.2 as the oldest tested common-API component version; Gentoo 6.11.1 supplies current reference evidence.

dependencies.name: qtdeclarative
dependencies.reason: The Experimental panel and notification modules directly use system QML, Qt Quick, and Quick Controls. Ubuntu 24.04 CI verifies Qt 6.4.2 as the oldest tested common-API component version; Gentoo 6.11.1-r1 supplies current reference evidence.

dependencies.name: libxcb
dependencies.reason: The Experimental Qt panel host and event-driven task controller consume the internal standards-only X11 adapter, which links system libxcb for dedicated event connections, RandR topology, EWMH task observation, and checked dock and window-manager requests. The complete shell runtime closure remains unmeasured.

unresolved.reason: The typed theme, launcher, task, and notification adapters, panel and notification QML modules, panel window host, and EWMH task controller are implemented, but the complete shell executable, live settings-snapshot client, runtime wiring, and direct and transitive closure still require measurement.
AT-SPI behavior was observed in the spike, but production accessibility linkage and packaging must be measured before declaration.
